entry.title: Re: Process Automation: Unattended agent is disconnected...
entry.content:
Hi Sankara,
I have an unattended installed on a Local Desktop. Is there any way I can run the attended bot on a remote machine so that I do not have to start that particular desktop and to have the unattended but still running?

entry.title: SAP MDK - Filter List picker using the value selected in the previous list picker on the same page.
entry.content:
Hello community !

In one of my SAP MDK Projects, I have a page with 3 list pickers, Plants, Projects and Department. I am trying to filter the Department list based on the value chosen for Plant. However this dynamic filtering is not working. 

Please suggest what can be done here !

This is my page.

This is my filtering: $filter=werks eq '{{#Control:FCSetPlant/#SelectedValue}}'

entry.title: Re: Splitting Ordinary Time into three Valuations
entry.content: HI @Volker_Ruof - Using the route time evaluation types here, once the Planned time > 29 mins, we can split it between TOIL and Overtime. However, is there a (automated) way for the system to process this logic recursively with 15 minute increments? As you mentioned, we could leverage the Route Evaluation type to selectively split them up via multiple time evaluations but is there a way to kind of loop through this logic until all of the Worked time is evaluated?

entry.title: SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 in Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

9 Phase Model Vs Traditional Maintenance methods [ 4HH, 4HI Vs BH1, BH2 & BJ2]

I found, for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Asset management scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 scope items are excluded from default activation (that means they are Deprecated) Whereas in SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition all scope items are available (for activation).

Question here - if client is going with Private cloud edition, can they still use processes around scope items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 as they will remain activated and not deprecated in near future? (May be for next 3-4 years’ time span)

As I understand scope items BH1,BH2,BJ2 are deprecated from 2302 release in public cloud and replaced with 4HH and 4HI, But still in case client requirements to not to go ahead with 9 Phase model in private cloud edition, Is it still valid proposition to suggest these scope items?

I couldn’t find clear answer on this in SAP road map explorer or anywhere else hence reaching out to wider group of experts here.

Any comments or suggestions are highly appreciated in terms of guiding client(s) into right direction during process adaptation, Considering SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2.

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: Re: Minimum Pay/Wage concept in SuccessFactors Time Tracking
entry.content:
HI @NeeleshKamath Thanks for the blog. This explains clearly on how to use the "Compare Threshold with Comparison Group to Route Input" valuation type. A follow-up question on using the same function but for recursively evaluating Working time in a specific manner. Here is how it needs to occur :https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/splitting-ordinary-time-into-three-valuations/qaq-p/13871222/comment-id/37432/emcs_t/S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufE0xOUY5SlBOSktRMFBVfDEzODcxMjQ5fFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs#M37432

Could you provide some pointers please?

Thanks,

Naveen

passing these inputes to the fm and when I am trying to execute getting the below one

 

Pls help anyone to resolve this.

entry.title: Re: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hi,

the Product Allocation works with quantities and not with percentages. In case you want would like to work with percentages, you would need to calculate the number and put this number into the time bucket of the planning data. There are basically two ways to achieve this:

  1. API to update the PAL planning data
  2. Excel up/download

The background why percentage is not supported is the following: When taking your example, it is straight forward to apply the percentage on top of the 1000pc and come to 500pc etc. Furthermore, when increasing the quantity from 1000pc to 2000pc, it would also make not such an issue, since 50% would increase the number to 1000pc. The trouble starts when for example reducing the overall quantity. In such a case you would start with 1000pc and let us say your Distribution Channel 3 has already a confirmation over 150pc (translating to 15%). You reduce your 1000pc to 700pc since 200pc had for instance to be scrapped. According to your percentage vice planning you would need to completely check all requirements again and correct the confirmations as 20% is no longer 200pc but 140pc. Hence, a over confirmation in the respective time bucket of Distribution Channel 3 exists. 

Additionally you run into situation where the percentage lead to fractions that cannot be confirmed. Think of an example where you want 14% of 457pc. This is 63,98pc.   

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Unable to Update manually added Standard Fields to St...
entry.content:
Hello @Sijin_Chandran ,

how do you know which correct CDS needs to be extended regarding adding standard fields in API_Purchase_Order, which in this case you enhance the 'E_PurchasingDocumentItem'.

entry.title: Re: How to search within this managed tag (SAP SQL Anywhere)?
entry.content:
According to that general question, basically you don't search within the SAP sites. I can't believe SAP cannot do better.

https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-seach-in-sap-community/qaq-p/13662086

entry.title: Re: Two colons in PATH
entry.content:
Hi Mark

You were right (by chance it looks) about SP03 PL07. That indeed happened to be the release where the WLA environment variable was introduced and it has been wrong from the start.

The KBA has been updated with following:

A fix for the issue from CR 829765 will be released in:

ASE 16.0 SP04 PL07
ASE 16.1

Workaround:
Manually modify the environment file and remove the extra character.

As there will be no further PLs for SP03, for this release the workaround needs to be applied.

Rgds

Bart

entry.title: RAP Managed Action RESULT is not updating the Response
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on a RAP Managed scenario with Unmanaged save. I have 2 actions as following,

  1. Test: Update few fields of the entityset and return the updated fields.
  2. Post: Execute BGMC Operation.

I have checked the post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/rap-action-does-not-update-the-instance/qaq-p/12531084 however the issue remains.

My action is,

 

action test result [1..*] $self;

 

My bdef mapping is,

 

create;
update;
action test result [1..*] $self;
action post;
mapping for zasset
{
message = message;
}

 

My action implementation is

 

METHOD test for MODIFY
IMPORTING keys FOR ACTION Asset~test RESULT result.

METHOD test .
MODIFY ENTITIES OF zasset IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY Asset
UPDATE FIELDS ( message )
WITH VALUE #( FOR <fs> IN keys ( %tky = <fs>-%tky message = 'Test' ) )
FAILED DATA(lt_failed) REPORTED DATA(lt_reported) .

READ ENTITIES OF zasset IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY Asset ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys ) RESULT DATA(lt_result) .

result = VALUE #( FOR <fs> IN lt_result ( %tky = <fs>-%tky %param = <fs> ) ) .
ENDMETHOD .

 

The requirement is to fill the message field with some messages after validating the keys whenever user clicks on the action TEST, like a simulation. The POST action is responsible for COMMIT to the database.

The result structure is having the updated value for the message field, however the response is not being updated either in browser or postman.

@Andre_Fischer, could you please help me here.

I appreciate your help on the issues mentioned above.

entry.title: How to cancel invoice schedule open dates in a sales order
entry.content:
There is a sales order contains invoice schedules. After created some invoices, you want to cancel the remaining invoice schedule dates as no more invoices are required.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to cancel invoice schedule open dates in a sales...
entry.content:
To manually cancel the open invoice schedule dates, the user can use the action - cancel open dates option.

  1. Edit the sales order.
  2. Go to Pricing and Invoicing -> Invoice Schedule tab.
  3. Expand the schedule for the line, you will see there is an invoice date scheduled in the future with Open status. You do not want to create invoice request for the date and need to cancel the date.
  4. Select the line row, click Actions button and select Cancel Open Dates. The date will be with Cancelled status.

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Manager - Requested object &ESRT_IDP_ID& is currently locked by user
entry.content: I resolved the issue. Check Idempotent Services and make sure it was scheduled and executed.

entry.title: Re: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content:
Hi,

I think that by resetting the user and logging in with it, you can transfer the property to another user.

Another option is to recover the code of the procedure and generate a new one in a different space, and update the objects that used it.

Regards,

Hello Experts,

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content:
Basics to make the Table Control cells with input enabled or disabled varying according to each line. Adapt to your needs.

Flow logic:

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  LOOP AT itab INTO line WITH CONTROL yourcontrol.
    MODULE pbo_one_line.
  ENDLOOP.

ABAP code:

MODULE pbo_one_line OUTPUT.
  LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(screen_field).
    CASE screen_field-name.
      WHEN 'COL3'. 
        IF line-col7 = 'TRUE'. 
          screen_field-input = '0'. "input disabled. 
        ELSE. 
          screen_field-input = '1'. "input enabled. 
        ENDIF. 
    ENDCASE. 
    MODIFY SCREEN.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDMODULE.

entry.title: Re: Payment Terms and Baseline Dates
entry.content: First of all , I would like to thank all for their fruitful feedbacks, in the meantime changing the baseline date to be equal to posting date will never give accurate payment term because the payment terms is usually determined either in agreement or included in the invoice (document date ) and as soon as the system should calculate the payment terms from document date so that, the baseline date shall be configured equal to document date and accordingly the payment term must be calculated from baseline date

entry.title: Re: Question regarding Dynamic time navigation functions in SAC
entry.content: Could anyone answer this?. I was hoping to create YTD, QTD, MTD reports in table or charts using the dynamic navigation functions and if the calculated measures display data only at the default hierarchy, then what is the purpose of these functions, what are the use cases for which these functions are suitable? I was expecting the calculated measures to aggregate (roll up or down) to the levels selected in the widget.

entry.title: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track Pune 2024
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the speaker registration for SAP Inside Track Pune 2024, happening on October 19th, 2024! Our focus is on the transformative power of SAP Business AI, and we are looking for passionate speakers to share their expertise and insights across various tracks. If you have experience in building AI applications, creating innovative Business AI solutions, or working with Embedded AI in SAP products, we invite you to contribute to our event.
 
Event Details:
Date: October 19th, 2024
Time: 9 AM - 5 PM IST
Venue: SAP Labs India, ITPP, Pune
 
Find more about the event in the announcement blog post: SAP Inside Track Pune 2024 - Announcement 
 
Speaker Tracks for your proposal:
Track 1: Building AI Applications on SAP BTP
Dive into the technicalities of building AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Demonstrate how developers and architects can leverage SAP BTP to create robust AI solutions that drive business value.

Track 2: Business AI Solutions from Ecosystem - Partners & Customers
Showcase successful AI solutions developed by SAP partners and customers. Share case studies, implementation experiences, and collaborative projects that highlight the innovative use of Business AI within the SAP ecosystem.

Track 3: Embedded AI across Solutions - SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors & Other SAP Products
Explore the integration of Embedded AI in various SAP products like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, CX, and more. Discuss how these intelligent features are transforming business processes and enhancing user experiences.
 
Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Pune 2024?
  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with a passionate and engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Enhance your professional profile and gain recognition within the SAP community
How to Register:
Ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Pune 2024? Register now to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most exciting SAP community events of the year.

Speaker Registration Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScrOZES6KJUk279dl06X4hzaQQMRuLeHkTGrX7wloUnXXpCcQ/viewform
 
Next Steps: Once you submit your proposal,
Step 1: Our expert team will go through your proposal and if it is shortlisted, we will contact your for more details.
Step 2: This will again be discussed internally with the experts and once shortlisted, we will inform you about the next steps – like presentation format, social media advertisement etc.,
We look forward to your valuable contributions and to seeing you at SAP Inside Track Pune 2024!
 
 
Best Regards,
SAP Community Pune Core Team

entry.title: Print preview function is greyed out in Change Journal Entries app screen on Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello!

I have a question regarding the functionality of "print preview" in Change Journal Entries app. 

We would like to export the journal entries from this screen but it seems like the function is not enabled on this app.

The steps taken to reach this screen is as below

"Manage Journal Entries" app > Select a journal entry and click on a link to jump to "Change Journal Entries" > Click on "Document" and find the greyed out "Print Preview" section.

Is there a way to enable it or a workaround to export the journal entry information?

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Re: Time Tracking (Timesheet): Time off in-Lieu accumulation in DAYS with expiry date

entry.title: Re: Problems while adding object to Transport request via FM TR_REQUEST_CHOICE.
entry.content:
No issue for me. Just filling:

IV_SUPPRESS_DIALOG = 'X'
IV_REQUEST = <my own workbench modifiable transport request>
IT_E071 = only R3TR FORM <my sapscript form> (no transport request)

Note that the object is added in the object list of the transport request, not the task.

entry.title: Re: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content: Yes, by default the owner is the user that creates the object, and ONLY if this user give permission to others, they can change the object. And I agree that it is not good policy to reset users, but neither is it good policy to have a user with a password that ONLY a ex-employee knows :-).

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - Filter List picker using the value selected...
entry.content:
This is a case of cascading list picker where you want to display value in a picker based on the selection from previous picker.

You will set a rule to the OnValueChange event of the Plant List picker. Based on the selected value from the Plant List picker, this rule will set the query option and update the Target Specifier of the Department List Picker.

See this example:

 

 

export default function PlantTypeChange(context) {
    let pageProxy = context.getPageProxy();
    let plantPicker = pageProxy.getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('SectionFormCell0').getControl('PlantLP');
    let plantTypeValue = plantPicker.getValue()[0].ReturnValue;
    let DepartmentPicker = pageProxy.getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('SectionFormCell0').getControl('DepartmentLP');
    let specifier = DepartmentPicker.getTargetSpecifier();
    let qo = `$filter=werks eq '${plantTypeValue}'`;
    specifier.setQueryOptions(qo);
    DepartmentPicker.setTargetSpecifier(specifier);
}

 

You may additionally set the Department Picker to disable until a Plant is selected.

entry.title: END TO END INSTALLATION OF SAP EHP8 ERP SYSTEM WITH ORACLE DATABASE 19c ON RHEL 8.8
entry.content:
# ATR(24)

Hello Basis folks, Sharing my article.

END TO END INSTALLATION OF SAP EHP8 ERP SYSTEM WITH ORACLE DATABASE 19c ON RHEL 8.8

[ 3 in 1 COMBO - 7 CHECK POINTS]
INSTALLATION OF EHP8 SAP SYSTEM
INSTALLATION OF ORACLE DB 19c
ORACLE DB PATCH UPDATE 19.24

CHECK POINTS:
1) PREREQUISITE CHECK FOR INSTALLATION
2) STACK XML FILE GENERATION IN MAINTENANCE PLANNER
3) SWPM OPERATION [START] – INSTALLATION OF BASE PACK
4) ORACLE DATABASE INSTALLATION (IN MID OF SWPM)
5) ORACLE PATCH UPDATE WITH POST INSTALLATION SCRIPT (IN MID OF SWPM)
6) COMPLETION OF SWPM – INSTALLATION OF BASE PACK
7) SUM EXECUTION – EHP UPDATE WITH SAP NW


Post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ajaytr66_atr-activity-7239972999372660736-m8Wp?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop 

Article Link: https://drive.google.com/file/d/18Mxwf7J8OcYdY-KS8A6i0l3cOdm8wEIZ/view?usp=sharing 
PASS: ATR
😊

entry.title: Automatically populate Person Responsible in IW32/33 screen
entry.content:
I want to auto populate person responsible field in IW33. The service order of certain order type and PM activity type is created through a custom transaction (using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN).

I tried using pers_no in wtbl_oper table for the BAPI in the custom program but that did not reflect in IW33 screen. So I am thinking of using enhancements for order creation at save which will let me update the pernr field in afvgd structure for the ordertype-activitytype combination

Any other suggestions are welcome as well. Thanks!

Example:  For a selected State, only Districts corresponding to that State should be visible. Similarly for a selected district only Taluka corresponding to that district should be shown.

Regards,

Girish

entry.title: Re: Document Information Extraction, Error message during...
entry.content:
by default , client is created , so first delete this default cliend_Id , and You can try to create new one ,

Step 1:-  check get/clients (to get all clients)
Step 2:-  if there is client it will show , other wise in json ,payload will be empty array.
Step 3:- if there is already client delete it , and you can create your client

entry.content: Pls. see my response on this post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-mdk-filter-list-picker-using-the-value-selected-in-the-previous-list/qaq-p/13876754

entry.title: Shippers Letter of instruction (SLI Form)
entry.content: Can anyone please tell me how to generate the Shippers Letter of instruction (SLI Form)

entry.title: Re: How to see long text of the error message for stuck q...
entry.content:
Hello @ChetanPatil1 

Double click on the error text in the "StatusText" field should bring you either the long text of the message or the error log. At least it works like that in my S/4HANA installation.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: double consumption
entry.content:
Hi  mhmdt1

Do you get double consumption on desktop also? if you dont get it double consumption in desktop, then there is a problem in handheld program so you need to debug and find the issue(if it is z program)  If it is happening in both desktop as well as handheld device then there is a problem in both program. As you mentioned fiori app so it seems it is a standard app. in this case you need to take help from SAP support team. it may be a bug in apps 

Also if it is a standard fiori apps you can see fiori library and see the enhancement packs

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Problems while adding object to Transport request via FM TR_REQUEST_CHOICE.
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thank you, it is adding now in the object list of TR by adding these parameters.
IV_SUPPRESS_DIALOG = 'X'
IV_REQUEST = <my own workbench modifiable transport request>
IT_E071 = only R3TR FORM <my sapscript form> (no transport request)

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - EWM How to start an ABAP repo...
entry.content: Hi, the linked solution in my understanding "only" covers "MM"-stock (ERP-only). The procedure for an SAP EWM warehouse is traditionally to upload the stock to the EWM system which than synchronizes the stock with the "ERP" System. So your proposed solution does not fit to the described problem.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Company Database not Displaying on the SLD
entry.content: Check that you have all the services related to the SAP installation started

entry.title: Re: Gropup reporting on premise 2023/SP1 - enable the hie...
entry.content: Hello ,

entry.title: Re: Physical inventory count
entry.content:
Hello @Arvindg991 

There's the Edit -> Select All menu option in MI04. Does it not work for you?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Friends helping friends solve the SAP Crossword puzzle
entry.content:
Our annual SAP Crossword puzzle has been released, and many people have already completed it, to get 1800 points 😸

But others are struggling with a few questions, so please ask your questions here. Those who have finished the puzzle, subscribe to this discussion and help your neighbors. Try not to just give away the answer, and instead offer what hints you can. You can also discuss the technology behind the clue, or you can discuss Sabrina Carpenter if the issue is 16 Down.

Most important is to enjoy.

entry.title: Unable to call CAPM destination in Custom Plugin for SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a CAP model that I want to use to call both GET and POST methods from my custom SAP UI5 plugin for SAP Digital Manufacturing. We've already created a destination and configured the details in the xs-app.json file.

Now, I need to call a GET method function in the UI but I am getting a 404 (Not Found) error. Could someone guide me on how to implement this?

 

Any help or code snippets would be greatly appreciated. 

Note:- I have created different applications for both CAPM and Plugin


Regards,
Kartik

entry.title: S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits.
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to enable to call S_ALR_87013047 with matnr more than 18 digits?
Now it's calling an programm 'GP2X60AJL2T7WL654EIQJIZNSOV300', and it generated by user.
How and where it;s generated, and is it possible to enable?

entry.title: Re: Gropup reporting on premise 2023/SP1 - enable the hie...
entry.content: hello , Yes , with the module PS in S4 , there is two dimensions (project for the first level and for the other levels its wbs elments) for the same hierarchy. Anyway, that be would a good idea to have hierarchy for the wbs elemennt hierarchy

entry.title: How to deactivate Exchange rate difference posting in Group Currency
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have below Scenario as of now:

Company Code Currency EUR

Group Currency INR

Invoice posted in Company Code currency (EUR)

Payment processing in EUR

However the exchange rate difference is also getting posted which is not needed. Can you pelase let us know how to deactivate this in Public Cloud.

For On premice we used to do this in OBY6 T-Code but not able to find a solution for this in CLoud.

entry.title: Setting up a Selection &status profile in QM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can anyone guide me how to set up a Selection profile and status profile in QM. My requirement is I don't want to see the cancelled inspection lots when I run QA 32 report. Kindly correct me if is there any way to achieve my requirement. Thank you !!

entry.title: Re: Foreign exchange gain/loss on GR on purchase order
entry.content:
AFAIK it wouid require either

  • Set the fixed rate on the Purchase Order
  • Use some development (there is no clearing at posting of GR, but usually at IR wher the gain/loss is posted vs inventory account)

Some related previous threads for reference: Treatment of Exchange Rate during Goods receipt, https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/exchange-rate-during-goods-receipt-kdm-and-prd/qaq-p/12155463.

entry.title: Devtoberfest has started
entry.content:
Hi Everyone 🙂

Devtoberfest has started this week. It will last for 5 weeks – with nearly 70 sessions, contest, tutorials and more...

Here is the general overview: Devtoberfest overview 

You can find the events schedule here: Devtoberfest-events 

Also there is the challenging contest, where you can earn points and Community badges. Here is the links to the contest overview and the first weeks activities: Contest overview ;  Devtoberfest Contest - first week 

And the fun part of course - Petoberfest. 

Sooo, good luck and have fun 🎉

entry.title: HCM Payroll: Sending payroll results from HR to FI with different org. structure - RPCIPE00_OLD
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have following situation: 

A company code is sending payroll postings from HR System to FI System. In order to create a posting, the HR system uses RFC communication to read the relevant GL accounts from FI system through symbolic account mapping. The report used on HR side is RPCIPE00_OLD.

Problem: The client has different company code, controlling area and chart of accounts in HR and FI systems. So the simulation check to read the GL accounts from FI is failing, as the query from HR is coming with old org. structure.

SAP Note 3434196 offers a possibility of changing the company code via method GET_SUBSTITUTION_BUKRS but is not applicable for the RPCIPE00_OLD. 

HR system is looking for a solution where all corrections are done in FI system.
How can this problem be solved? Is there any way to modify the RFC communication on FI side, so that the query from HR is replaced with new org. structure values and correct GL accounts are reported back to HR? Or can the modification be done only on HR side?

Thank you very much in advance.
Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Application Studio - Data Preview not working for calculation views
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you please check:

1. If you have logged into the Cloud Foundry with the right endpoint, org/space?

2. If the project is bound to the right hdi-container instance?

Please feel free to contact me (liang.shu@sap.com) via email or MS Teams.

entry.title: Re: Financial Statement Version YSP2 – To Activate vs. To...

entry.title: Power Designer : How forcing the value of property of column in a PDM
entry.content:
Hello, 

We want to be able to force the value of the WITH DEFAULT property of a DB2 column when it is created: via the interface or via generation from another model.

You have told us that the Initialize event is not triggered when generating data models and you have advised us to go through transformations (executing post scripting).
But could you give us an example of code to implement in transformations, especially to test that the column from the generation is being created.
 
Thanks

entry.title: Re: Download File from Solution Documentation 7.2 in PDF...
entry.content:
Hello,

there is no such function available in standard.

Regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: SAP Workzone: handling Knowledge Base and Documents expiring
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is it possible for Workzone to send reminders/open tasks to the system admins and the publication owner for the review of expiring documents and knowledge bases?

We know that is possibile to set pubblication Settings (Publication Settings for Blog Posts, Wiki Pages, or Knowledge Base Articles ) but we didn't find anything about "warning" of expriration of KBA or similars.

Thanks!

Kind regarrds,

Leila

Thank you very much for your reply.

The version is 2408. 

Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Application Studio - Data Preview not wo...
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you please check:

1. If you have logged into the Cloud Foundry with the right endpoint, org/space?

2. If the project is bound to the right hdi-container instance?

Please feel free to contact me (liang.shu@sap.com) via email or MS Teams.

entry.title: Re: Error in S4 Hana Public Cloud for Business Partner Replication
entry.content: @SAPSupport could you help?

entry.title: Re: Got error creating HANA service
entry.content:
You need to first create a sap hana data base, because the SAP HANA Schemas & HDI Containers service relies on an active database to manage its schema and container resources. The service is distribute the resources of sap hana database to store your data and manage development objects like tables, views, and procedures within a database.

 

How to create an SAP HANA Cloud Database: 

  • Go to SAP HANA Cloud in your subaccount and create a new instance.
  • Follow the setup instructions, ensuring you select the appropriate region, size, and configuration for your development environment.
  • Once the HANA Cloud instance is created and running, verify it by checking its status in the SAP HANA Cloud dashboard.

entry.title: Re: SAP Payroll
entry.content: you can find certification details here and either you learn through SAP learning hup/training centre or you prepare on your own with help of udemy etc. https://training.sap.com/certification/c_hcmp_2311-sap-certified-associate---sap-hcm-payroll-for-sap-s4hana-g/?

entry.title: Enabling Email Notifications in SAP Build Work Zone via Microsoft 365 Exchange Online (OAuth-Based)
entry.content:
Email notifications are an essential component for organizations using SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Task Center and other products delivered by SAP to keep users informed about updates, events, and tasks, see a diagram below as a reference visualizing SAP Task Center use case about sending  email notifications.

Microsoft announced the deprecation of Basic Authentication for Exchange Online (as outlined here). It means users of Microsoft 365 must now switch to OAuth-based authentication for sending email notifications. This change impacts users of SAP Build Work Zone and other SAP cloud products like SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Task Center.Thus, to ensure email notifications continue functioning, users of Microsoft 365, must configure SAP BTP subaccount destination for email notifications in SAP Build Work Zone using OAuth Client Credentials Flow (applicable to Microsoft 365 Exchange Online).

Together with my team-mate Angel Tonchev, we have noticed that SAP customers experience challenges to setup Microsoft 365 Exchange Online to OAuth-based authentication and then use these properties to setup the correctly SMTP Mail Destination in SAP BTP. This is why, we joint forces to prepate this guide. I hope you will find it useful! 

Prerequisites

Before configuring the Internet mail destination with OAuth Client Credentials Flow in your SAP BTP subaccount, ensure that notifications for SAP Build Work Zone have already been enabled. Follow the instructions outlined in the official SAP documentation here to set up notifications from your cloud solutions.

Configuring OAuth-Based Authentication for Microsoft 365

To generate the needed OAuth-Based Authentication properties, these configurations are to be done in your Microsoft 365 account:

  1. Open “office.com”. Click on the dots in the upper left corner and choose “Admin”
  2. On the left panel choose “Show all”

     

    3. After that, choose “All admin centers” and from there choose “Microsoft Entra"

3.1. In the Microsoft Entra admin center, navigate to Identity -> Applications -> App registration and choose “New registration”

4. Enter a name and click Register

5. On next window, choose “Certificates and secrets” -> “New client secret”

Note down the Value as it is a one-time view:

6. Next, on the left-side menu  choose: “API permissions” and then "Add a permission"

7. From there, choose “APIs my organization uses” -> “Office 365 Exchange Online”

8. Then, choose “Application permissions”, search for “smtp” and select “SMTP.SendAsApp”. Choose “Add permissions”

9. On next window choose “Grant admin consent for MSFT”

10. App registration - Overview page:  note down Application (client) ID and Directory (tenant) ID

Register a Microsoft Entra app and create a service principal

Once that’s done, you need to create a dedicated technical user email for sending alerts. You can decide which user is going to be used for sending emails or you can decide to create a new technical one for that.

1. From Microsoft Admin Center, navigate to: Users -> Add a user and follow the procedure as per the screenshot below.

Then, from Microsoft Admin Center, navigate to Users-> Active Users, and select the created / newly added user:
- click “Mail” under the user -> select “Manage email apps”
- make sure that “Authenticated SMTP” is checked.

Register the app service principle in Exchange Online with PowerShell or to the Azure environment (in case you have access). To do so , please check the documentation here: Register a Microsoft Entra app and create a service principal

Note: you can also consult the official documentation for PowerShell

In PowerShell:
1. Run line  “Install-Module -Name ExchangeOnlineManagement -allowprerelease” (on error remove “– allowprerelease”)
2. Run line  “Import-module ExchangeOnlineManagement”
3. Run line “Connect-ExchangeOnline -Organization <Directory (tenant) ID>”
NOTE: “Directory (tenant) ID” which we noted down in “Procedure” step #10
4. Run line “New-ServicePrincipal -AppId < Application (client) ID > -ObjectId <Object ID>”

NOTE: “Application (client) ID” which we noted down in “Procedure” step #10
 The Object ID is different than the one that we used in the one visible on APP creation. To get the right onе, go the “Microsoft Entra admin center”->“Identity“->“Applications“->“Enterprise applications“->“All Applications“. Select your app->from “Overview”, you can copy the Object ID

5.Run line “ Add-MailboxPermission -Identity "username@domain.com" -User  <Object ID> -AccessRights FullAccess”
NOTE: For “Identity” use the user created specially created in the “Create dedicated User” section

That’s an example on how the outcome should look like:

Configure a Destination service in your SAP BTP subaccount

Now as we are ready with all the needed configurations from Microsoft365 side, we proceed with applying the needed properties in your Destination service in your SAP BTP subaccount. To do so, please follow the steps listed underneath:

1. Access your SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) cockpit.

2. Go to the Destinations section under your subaccount and click “Create Destination”

3. Create a new destination for the SMTP Mail server with the properties described in this procedure, see point (b) Internet mail destination with OAuth Client Credentials Flow :

Example destination:

    • Name: SAP_Business_Notifications_Mail
    • Type: Mail
    • Proxy Type: Internet
    • Authentication: OAuth2ClientCredentials
    • Client ID: <Application (client) ID ” see step #10 “App registration - Overview page”
    • Client Secret: <Secret ID>, see step #5: “Certificates and secrets” -> “New client secret”
    • Token Service URL Type: Dedicated
    • Token Service URL: https://login.microsoftonline.com/<Tenant ID>/oauth2/v2.0/token
      Note: for <Tenant ID> use the “Directory (tenant) ID” from step #10 “App registration- Overview page”

 Additional Properties:

    • mail.smtp.host: smtp.office365.com
    • mail.smtp.port: 587
    • mail.username: <technical_user_email_address>
    • mail.smtp.from: <technical_user_email_address>
    • scope: https://outlook.office365.com/.default
    • [optional] mail.smtp.timeout: 5000

Testing Your Configuration

Once the configuration is complete, send a test email notification from SAP Build Work Zone to ensure everything is working as expected, see a test email I was able to receive shared below:.

Recap

With the deprecation of Basic Authentication in Microsoft 365 Exchange Online, it’s crucial for SAP Build Work Zone users to switch to OAuth-based authentication for SMTP Mail destinations. This guide has provided step-by-step instructions for configuring Microsoft 365 OAuth Client Credentials Flow, ensuring seamless email notifications for SAP cloud products.

This configuration not only applies to SAP Build Work Zone but can also be used for other SAP products like SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Task Center, enabling secure and reliable email notifications.

We hope this guide has been helpful. If you have any questions or suggestions, we’re open to your feedback! Feel free to share your thoughts in the comments.

entry.title: Re: 在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 中通过自定义逻辑检查预制发票的付款条件与供应商主数据中的付款条件是否一致
entry.content:
Buenas Zhehui,

¿ Cómo podría chequear si existe un anexo cargado para dar un mensaje de error en caso de que no exista ?

He estado mirando variables debugueando pero no veo nada relacionado a los attachments

Muchas gracias.

entry.title: Weird FIORI behaviour after system copy
entry.content:
Hello All, I am facing an issue after a system S4/Hana Copy. I refreshed TST system by PROD.

In fiori TST when i use the tile su01 it redirects to the su01 of an INT system. THis is weird because i have refreshed by PROD not INT. Does any one have an idea ? Are there some specific post step for fiori after a system copy ? 

Regards,

Hugues

entry.title: Annotation for Industry-Specific Colors (Indication Colors) available?
entry.content:
I am currently developing an SAP Fiori Elements application that works a lot with freely definable status values.

Team leaders have the option of adding status values and can also assign a color to the status. Since I didn't just want to offer the standard red/yellow/green values, I built in the colors so that they can be displayed as “Industry-Specific Colors (Indication Colors)”. This means that I have 20 colors available, which are sufficient for the purpose.

In a responsive table, I would now like to highlight the rows according to the status color. However, this is only possible with the “Semantic Colors” using the "UI.Criticality" annotation.

Is there a way to highlight rows via annotation with the Industry Specific Colors?

In the Design Guidelines for the Responsive Table you can see a corresponding image (https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/responsive-table/), but it looks like you have to use a custom view to initialize the table and then assign the value accordingly using the “highlight” property. I would like to avoid this and solve it via annotations, but so far I haven't found anything.

Maybe someone else has an idea?

entry.title: Re: Automatically populate Person Responsible in IW32/33...
entry.content:
From your screenshot the displayed field seems to be a partner defined at header of order header

  • Can you check field name (F1/tech.opt) and your order type Customizing
  • Look at parameter(s) IT_PARTNER(_UP)

entry.title: Re: 🔴 FlashPipe - Your CI/CD Companion for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: How is it different from Cloud Transport Management to move artifact from one tenant to other ?
